reviews-subtitle: Discover some feedback from companies that benefit from Prizy's services.
reviewer1-title: Head of purchasing at LAFARGE Algeria
reviewer1-review: “ Thanks to Prizy's digital gift cards and their wide range of partner stores, each employee was able to choose the gift he or she wanted to have. A total satisfaction of the employees. A very practical and optimal digital solution that also contributes to the preservation of the environment by reducing the use of paper. Bravo! “
reviewer2-review: “ A big thank you to the Prizy team for helping us set up an employee incentive program. My team performed better thanks to the digital gift cards, valid in more than 70 stores, which was a great motivational tool for them. If you want to boost your team's productivity, Prizy is the right tool for you! “
reviewer3-title: HR Engagement & Project at DHL Express
reviewer3-review: “ A huge thank you to the Prizy team. We were able to offer gift cards to all our employees across the country thanks to their dematerialized gift card solution. Distance was no longer an obstacle and everyone was able to benefit from the multitude of stores they offer? Motivate your teams, choose Prizy! “
reviewer4-review: “ Prizy, what a great opportunity for companies to boost and encourage their employees! It was a great discovery. We were looking for a solution in the context of the management of social works... Prizy is 'The Solution'! With the gift cards given to our employees and their families for the month of Ramadan. So soon ordered, so soon received. With a panel of more than 50 brands, between food, ready-to-wear, decoration... we are more than satisfied. We are delighted to collaborate with Prizy, a young and talented team. “

question1: What happens if I am refused my Prizy gift card?
question2: Can I use my gift card in several transactions in different stores?
question3: What should I do if I discover that my gift card has been used fraudulently ?
question4: Can I use my gift card after the validity period ?
question5: What should I do if I need to return or exchange a product in one of the partner stores ?
question6: Your question is not on the list ?
answer1: I need to call this number (+213) 550 57 66 44 right away or send an email to this address contact@fixitplus.io.
answer2: Yes, I can use my gift card in several transactions in different stores within the limit of the amount of my endowment and the validity date.
answer3: I need to call this number right away (+213) 550 57 66 44.
answer4: No, I cannot use my gift card beyond the validity date, however my employer may decide to increase the validity of my gift card, at which time I could reuse the remaining amount of my gift card.
answer5: Returns and exchanges are governed by the terms of sale of each brand, however, in case of accepted return, the seller in charge of the transaction must transmit the proof of your return in order to proceed with the refund of the transaction amount.
answer6: Contact our support department for any other questions
faq-subtitle: If you don't find your question among these, don't hesitate to contact us. Our team will be happy to answer you.

whatisprizysubtitle1: The solution to Boost, Motivate and Retain
whatisprizysubtitle2: 100% dematerialized, Prizy gift cards allow their beneficiaries to consume them in a large network of multi-category partner stores ranging from ready-to-wear, accessories, household appliances, electronics, sports and wellness, food industry...
whatisprizysubtitle3: They can also be used at partner websites available in our catalog
step1: I designate the amount to be distributed to the beneficiaries on the platform and I send it in one click
step2: The beneficiary receives an email indicating the amount of the donation and the validity date of the Prizy gift card
step3: From that moment on, he can use his Prizy gift card in any store or e-commerce website available in our catalog
step4: All they have to do is present their QR code on any device (smartphone or tablet) or paper version (after printing) to the cashier/salesperson of the Prizy partner store
step5: To finalize the transaction, he must enter his 4-digit secret code

The exclusive AZADEA Group card. 

This gift card enables its beneficiaries to shop at the various brands represented by the AZADEA Group: Zara, Massimo Dutti, Pull&Bear, Bershka, Stradivarius, Oysho, Sunglass Hut & Zara Home.
